controls.control_objective: To ensure be called the reserve bank of india (regional rural banks - governance) directions, 2025
controls.control_description:
These Directions shall be called the Reserve Bank of India (Regional Rural
Banks - Governance) Directions, 2025.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be called the reserve bank of india (regional rural banks - governance) directions, 2025

controls.control_objective: To ensure come into force with immediate effect
controls.control_description: These Directions shall come into force with immediate effect.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to come into force with immediate effect

controls.control_objective: To ensure be applicable to regional rural banks (hereinafter collectively referred to as 'rrbs' and individually as an 'rrb') as defined under clause (ja) of se
controls.control_description:
These Directions shall be applicable to Regional Rural Banks (hereinafter
collectively referred to as 'RRBs' and individually as an 'RRB') as defined under
Clause (ja) of Section 5 of the Banking Regulation Act, 1949, to the extent they
are not inconsistent with the statutory provisions or instructions issued
thereunder.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be applicable to regional rural banks (hereinafter collectively referred to as 'rrbs' and individually as an 'rrb') as defined under clause (ja) of se

controls.control_objective: To ensure bear the meanings assigned to them below: (1) 'chairman', in relation to an rrb, means the individual appointed or re-appointed under sub-section (1)
controls.control_description:
In these directions, unless the context states otherwise, the terms herein shall
bear the meanings assigned to them below:
(1) 'Chairman', in relation to an RRB, means the individual appointed or re-appointed
under sub-section (1) of section 11 of The Regional Rural Banks Act, 1976, as
the Chairman of that bank.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to bear the meanings assigned to them below: (1) 'chairman', in relation to an rrb, means the individual appointed or re-appointed under sub-section (1)

controls.control_objective: To ensure public sector banks, private sector banks, regional rural banks and foreign banks
controls.control_description:
(2) 'Commercial Banks' means Public Sector Banks, Private Sector Banks, Regional
Rural Banks and Foreign Banks.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to public sector banks, private sector banks, regional rural banks and foreign banks

controls.control_objective: To ensure a member of the board of that rrb
controls.control_description: (3) 'Director', in relation to an RRB, means a member of the Board of that RRB.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to a member of the board of that rrb

controls.control_objective: To ensure the bank defined under clause (g) of section 2 of the regional rural banks act, 1976
controls.control_description:
(4) 'Sponsor Bank' means the bank defined under Clause (g) of Section 2 of the
Regional Rural Banks Act, 1976.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to the bank defined under clause (g) of section 2 of the regional rural banks act, 1976

controls.control_objective: To ensure have the same meaning as have been assigned to them under the reserve bank of india act, 1934 or the banking regulation act, 1949, the regional rural
controls.control_description:
All other expressions, unless defined herein, shall have the same meaning as
have been assigned to them under the Reserve Bank of India Act, 1934 or the
Banking Regulation Act, 1949, the Regional Rural Banks Act, 1976, or any
<image>
statutory modification or re-enactment thereto, or Glossary of Terms published
by RBI or as used in common or commercial parlance, as the case may be.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have the same meaning as have been assigned to them under the reserve bank of india act, 1934 or the banking regulation act, 1949, the regional rural

controls.control_objective: To ensure ensure adherence to the following illustrative, but not exhaustive, list of do's and dont's: (1) do's: a board member shall explanation: under section
controls.control_description:
The directors on the Board of an RRB shall ensure adherence to the following
illustrative, but not exhaustive, list of DO'S and DONT'S:
(1) DO'S: A board member shall
Explanation: Under Section 13(1)(b) of the RRBs Act 1976, the seat of a
nominee director who remains absent without leave of the Board for
more than 3 consecutive meetings shall become vacant.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to ensure adherence to the following illustrative, but not exhaustive, list of do's and dont's: (1) do's: a board member shall explanation: under section

controls.control_objective: To ensure make suitable changes as it deems fit keeping in view the best corporate governance standards
controls.control_description:
Explanation: The list of items indicated in the above model agenda are indicative
in nature and an RRB may make suitable changes as it deems fit keeping in view
the best corporate governance standards.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to make suitable changes as it deems fit keeping in view the best corporate governance standards

controls.control_objective: To ensure be as as notified by goi from time to time
controls.control_description:
The fees and allowances payable to the Non-Official Directors on the Board of
an RRB shall be as as notified by GoI from time to time.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be as as notified by goi from time to time

controls.control_objective: To ensure set up an independent audit committee of the board (acb) for overseeing and providing direction to its internal audit, inspection machinery, statutory
controls.control_description:
An RRB may set up an independent Audit Committee of the Board (ACB) for
overseeing and providing direction to its internal audit, inspection machinery,
Statutory (external) auditors and other executives.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to set up an independent audit committee of the board (acb) for overseeing and providing direction to its internal audit, inspection machinery, statutory

controls.control_objective: To ensure have direct, unfettered and independent access to management, internal audit, and statutory auditors, with whom it needs to communicate in confidence
controls.control_description:
It may have direct, unfettered
and independent access to management, internal audit, and statutory auditors,
with whom it needs to communicate in confidence, independent of each other.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have direct, unfettered and independent access to management, internal audit, and statutory auditors, with whom it needs to communicate in confidence

controls.control_objective: To ensure consist of three / four directors with one or more of such directors having experience in management, finance, accountancy, audit systems, etc
controls.control_description:
The ACB of an RRB may consist of three / four directors with one or more of such
directors having experience in management, finance, accountancy, audit
systems, etc.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to consist of three / four directors with one or more of such directors having experience in management, finance, accountancy, audit systems, etc

controls.control_objective: To ensure consider co- opting a chartered accountant or other professionally qualified person in the acb
controls.control_description:
(i) in case no director/s are available in the Board to function in the ACB
with adequate background in these areas, the Board may consider co-
opting a Chartered Accountant or other professionally qualified person in
the ACB.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to consider co- opting a chartered accountant or other professionally qualified person in the acb

controls.control_objective: To ensure be a member of the acb
controls.control_description: (ii) the Chairman of the RRB may not be a member of the ACB;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be a member of the acb

controls.control_objective: To ensure be inducted into the acb
controls.control_description: (iii) the NABARD's Nominee Director may be inducted into the ACB.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be inducted into the acb

controls.control_objective: To ensure be adopted and this could be done by rotation annually
controls.control_description:
(iv) the normal convention of choosing the senior-most Director of the Board
as the Chairman of the ACB may be adopted and this could be done by
rotation annually, if considered necessary, due to the changes in the
incumbencies of the Directors on the Board;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be adopted and this could be done by rotation annually

controls.control_objective: To ensure ideally be in a position to furnish clarifications required by the committee in respect of issues pertaining to any of the regions, the presence of concerned regional managers may be enlisted
controls.control_description:
(v) while the representative of Head Office of an RRB, who is associated
with the conduct of the ACB meetings, may ideally be in a position to
furnish clarifications required by the Committee in respect of issues
pertaining to any of the Regions, the presence of concerned Regional
Managers may be enlisted, if warranted, solely for the purpose of eliciting
their views on critical issues pertaining to their respective Region.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to ideally be in a position to furnish clarifications required by the committee in respect of issues pertaining to any of the regions, the presence of concerned regional managers may be enlisted

controls.control_objective: To ensure ensure that audit committee members are independent, understand banking and financial matters and have the characteristics to serve as effective audit
controls.control_description:
The Board of Directors may ensure that Audit Committee members are
independent, understand banking and financial matters and have the
characteristics to serve as effective Audit Committee members.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to ensure that audit committee members are independent, understand banking and financial matters and have the characteristics to serve as effective audit

controls.control_objective: To ensure consider whether the members of the acb: <image>
controls.control_description:
For this purpose,
they may consider whether the members of the ACB:
<image>
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to consider whether the members of the acb: <image>

controls.control_objective: To ensure meet at least four times annually, or more frequently as circumstances dictate
controls.control_description:
The ACB may meet at least four times annually, or more frequently as
circumstances dictate.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to meet at least four times annually, or more frequently as circumstances dictate

controls.control_objective: To ensure arrange to fix these meetings by either pre-fixing or suffixing the same to their board meetings in normal circumstances
controls.control_description:
In order to obviate the problem arising out of lack of
quorum in Audit Committee meetings, the RRB may arrange to fix these
meetings by either pre-fixing or suffixing the same to their Board Meetings in
normal circumstances.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to arrange to fix these meetings by either pre-fixing or suffixing the same to their board meetings in normal circumstances

controls.control_objective: To ensure also aid in economising the expenditure
controls.control_description:
Conducting meetings of the ACB either in the forenoon or
afternoon of the same day as the Board meetings may also aid in economising
the expenditure.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also aid in economising the expenditure

controls.control_objective: To ensure also meet, at least half-yearly, with management, the chief of the statutory audit / inspection team and the department of accounts in separate sessio
controls.control_description:
The ACB may also meet, at least half-yearly, with management, the chief of the
statutory audit / inspection team and the department of accounts in separate
sessions to discuss any matters that the Committee or each of these groups
believe should be discussed privately.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also meet, at least half-yearly, with management, the chief of the statutory audit / inspection team and the department of accounts in separate sessio

controls.control_objective: To ensure oversee the internal controls and financial reporting process of the rrb as implemented by management, identification and quantification of various fi
controls.control_description:
The ACB may oversee the internal controls and financial reporting process of the
RRB as implemented by management, identification and quantification of various
financial risks faced by the RRB and controls related to that process, and
ensuring a fair and transparent financial reporting process.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to oversee the internal controls and financial reporting process of the rrb as implemented by management, identification and quantification of various fi

controls.control_objective: To ensure assist the board of directors in fulfilling its oversight responsibilities by reviewing the rrb's: <image>
controls.control_description:
The ACB may assist the Board of Directors in fulfilling its oversight
responsibilities by reviewing the RRB's:
<image>
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to assist the board of directors in fulfilling its oversight responsibilities by reviewing the rrb's: <image>

controls.control_objective: To ensure perform, inter-alia, the following functions:
controls.control_description: For the above purpose, an ACB may perform, inter-alia, the following functions:
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to perform, inter-alia, the following functions:

controls.control_objective: To ensure represent the acb for purposes of this review
controls.control_description:
The Chairman of the Audit Committee may represent the
ACB for purposes of this review;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to represent the acb for purposes of this review

controls.control_objective: To ensure also ensure a periodic review of the rrb's accounting policies, systems, and controls to enhance <image> transparency in financial reporting and ensur
controls.control_description:
The Committee may also ensure a periodic review of
the RRB's accounting policies, systems, and controls to enhance
<image>
transparency in financial reporting and ensure adequacy of controls in
addressing current and emerging risks faced by the RRB;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also ensure a periodic review of the rrb's accounting policies, systems, and controls to enhance <image> transparency in financial reporting and ensur

controls.control_objective: To ensure be conducted at an appropriate time subsequent to implementation of changes or improvements, as decided by the acb
controls.control_description:
This review may be conducted at an appropriate time
subsequent to implementation of changes or improvements, as decided
by the ACB.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be conducted at an appropriate time subsequent to implementation of changes or improvements, as decided by the acb

controls.control_objective: To ensure specifically examine any omission on the part of internal inspecting <image> officials or concurrent auditors to detect serious irregularities that co
controls.control_description:
The Committee may
specifically examine any omission on the part of internal inspecting
<image>
officials or concurrent auditors to detect serious irregularities that come
to light at a later stage;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to specifically examine any omission on the part of internal inspecting <image> officials or concurrent auditors to detect serious irregularities that co

controls.control_objective: To ensure also review the follow-up on concurrent audit observations
controls.control_description:
The Committee may also review the
follow-up on concurrent audit observations.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also review the follow-up on concurrent audit observations

controls.control_objective: To ensure be in place
controls.control_description:
If measures are not adopted,
compelling reasons may be in place.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be in place

controls.control_objective: To ensure also fix accountability for unsatisfactory compliance of inspection / audit reports, delay in compliance and non-rectification of deficiencies
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also fix accountability for unsatisfactory compliance of inspection / audit reports, delay in compliance and non-rectification of deficiencies

controls.control_objective: To ensure , the acb may not be overloaded with other activities or else, the committee may lose sight of its major objectives or perform its duties superficiall
controls.control_description:
Provided that, the ACB may not be overloaded with other activities or else, the
Committee may lose sight of its major objectives or perform its duties
superficially.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to , the acb may not be overloaded with other activities or else, the committee may lose sight of its major objectives or perform its duties superficiall

controls.control_objective: To ensure firm up its detailed policy keeping in view these broad guidelines and frameworks
controls.control_description:
The bank
may firm up its detailed policy keeping in view these broad guidelines and
frameworks.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to firm up its detailed policy keeping in view these broad guidelines and frameworks

controls.control_objective: To ensure , with the approval of its board or the acb, decide on the periodicity of review of various issues and accordingly, draw an annual calendar of reviews
controls.control_description:
While an RRB may, with the approval of its Board or the ACB, decide on the
periodicity of review of various issues and accordingly, draw an annual Calendar
of Reviews to be put up to the ACB, they may adopt the following periodicity in
respect of the undernoted items:
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to , with the approval of its board or the acb, decide on the periodicity of review of various issues and accordingly, draw an annual calendar of reviews

controls.control_objective: To ensure consider having a small credit and operational risk management cell immediately, to begin with
controls.control_description:
Since the volume, size and nature of operations of
RRBs are small as compared to the commercial banks, they may consider having
a small Credit and Operational Risk Management Cell immediately, to begin with.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to consider having a small credit and operational risk management cell immediately, to begin with

controls.control_objective: To ensure effectively coordinate between credit risk management committee (crmc), asset liability management committee (alco) and other risk committees of the bank
controls.control_description:
For this
purpose, RMC may effectively coordinate between Credit Risk Management
Committee (CRMC), Asset Liability Management Committee (ALCO) and other
risk committees of the bank, if any.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to effectively coordinate between credit risk management committee (crmc), asset liability management committee (alco) and other risk committees of the bank

controls.control_objective: To ensure , therefore, ensure that the independence of the rmc is not compromised at any cost
controls.control_description:
The Board of the RRB may, therefore, ensure that the independence of the RMC
is not compromised at any cost.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to , therefore, ensure that the independence of the rmc is not compromised at any cost

controls.control_objective: To ensure be put in place to spell out the rationale for such an action and may be properly documented
controls.control_description:
In the event of the Board not accepting any
recommendation of this committee, systems may be put in place to spell out the
rationale for such an action and may be properly documented.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be put in place to spell out the rationale for such an action and may be properly documented

controls.control_objective: To ensure be made available to the internal and external auditors for their scrutiny and comments
controls.control_description:
This document
<image>
may be made available to the internal and external auditors for their scrutiny and
comments.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be made available to the internal and external auditors for their scrutiny and comments

controls.control_objective: To ensure be effectively communicated throughout the organization
controls.control_description:
The credit risk strategy and policies adopted by RMC may be effectively
communicated throughout the organization.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be effectively communicated throughout the organization

controls.control_objective: To ensure , at its discretion, constitute sub-committees and support committees to assist the rmc
controls.control_description:
An RRB may, at its discretion, constitute sub-committees and support
committees to assist the RMC.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to , at its discretion, constitute sub-committees and support committees to assist the rmc

controls.control_objective: To ensure discuss the following as part of its meeting agenda:
controls.control_description: The RMC of an RRB may discuss the following as part of its meeting agenda:
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to discuss the following as part of its meeting agenda:

controls.control_objective: To ensure include additional items based on local conditions and emergent priorities
controls.control_description:
The agendas suggested for each of the committees above are illustrative and
not exhaustive, and an RRB may include additional items based on local
conditions and emergent priorities.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to include additional items based on local conditions and emergent priorities

controls.control_objective: To ensure continue to remain repealed
controls.control_description:
The Directions, instructions, and guidelines
repealed prior to the issuance of these Directions shall continue to remain
repealed.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to continue to remain repealed

controls.control_objective: To ensure continue to be governed by the provisions thereof
controls.control_description:
Notwithstanding such repeal, any action taken or purported to have been taken,
or initiated under the repealed Directions, instructions, or guidelines shall
continue to be governed by the provisions thereof.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to continue to be governed by the provisions thereof

controls.control_objective: To ensure be deemed as governed by these directions
controls.control_description:
All approvals or
acknowledgments granted under these repealed lists shall be deemed as
governed by these Directions.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be deemed as governed by these directions

controls.control_objective: To ensure in any way prejudicially affect:
controls.control_description:
Further, the repeal of these directions,
instructions, or guidelines shall not in any way prejudicially affect:
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to in any way prejudicially affect:

controls.control_objective: To ensure be instituted, continued, or enforced and any such penalty, forfeiture or punishment may be imposed as if those directions, instructions, or guideline
controls.control_description:
and
any such investigation, legal proceedings or remedy may be instituted,
continued, or enforced and any such penalty, forfeiture or punishment may be
imposed as if those directions, instructions, or guidelines had not been repealed.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be instituted, continued, or enforced and any such penalty, forfeiture or punishment may be imposed as if those directions, instructions, or guideline

controls.control_objective: To ensure be in addition to, and not in derogation of the provisions of any other laws, rules, regulations, or directions, for the time being in force
controls.control_description:
The provisions of these Directions shall be in addition to, and not in derogation
of the provisions of any other laws, rules, regulations, or directions, for the time
being in force.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be in addition to, and not in derogation of the provisions of any other laws, rules, regulations, or directions, for the time being in force

controls.control_objective: To ensure be final and binding
controls.control_description:
For the purpose of giving effect to the provisions of these Directions or in order
to remove any difficulties in the application or interpretation of the provisions of
these Directions, the RBI may, if it considers necessary, issue necessary
clarifications in respect of any matter covered herein and the interpretation of any
provision of these Directions given by the RBI shall be final and binding.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be final and binding
